description: Hold F3 at neutral and concentrate the masculine move into F2, testing whether the bottle effect is mostly a too-broad downward shift.
Preserve the third resonance proxy for female-to-masculine edits so the result stops sounding like broad high-frequency suppression.

Keep F1 and F3 near neutral while pushing F2 more assertively, aiming for tract-shape change without dulling upper-band air.
